result:
All 30 tests pass. The implementation added 6 new commands to `src/minigit.php`:

- **`status`** — lists staged files or prints `(none)`
- **`diff`** — compares two commits' file lists, reporting Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout`** — restores working directory files from a commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset`** — moves HEAD without touching working directory files
- **`rm`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent
